mapper.select: select * from teacher_role_permission where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select * from teacher_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId} and deleted = 0
select * from teacher_role_permission where permission_id = #{permissionId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into teacher_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, sort_order, create_time, deleted) values (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: update teacher_role_permission set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
